start.speaker: Apollyon
start.text: Where do you think you are going, deserter? You were born in my city, wore my colors, and served me with more eagerness than you now admit. I know the promises you broke and the sins you once defended.

choices.text: All of that is true. And all of it was carried to the Cross behind me.
choices.text_zh: 那一切都是真的。而那一切，都已被带到我身后的十字架上了。

choices.text: My knees shake, but I will not make fear my master again.
choices.text_zh: 我的膝在抖，但我不会再让恐惧作我的主。

text_variants.text: I can see the shame still clinging to you, deserter — you wear it like my old colors. Where do you think you are going? I know the promises you broke.
text_variants.text_zh: 我看得见那羞耻仍黏在你身上，逃兵——你像穿着我旧日的衣色。你以为你要往哪儿去？你毁过的诺言我都知道。

text_variants.text: Still so certain of your own strength? Good. Pride was always the easiest leash to hold. Where do you think you are going, deserter? You served me well once.
text_variants.text_zh: 还这么笃定自己的力量？很好。骄傲向来是最好牵的绳。你以为你要往哪儿去，逃兵？你曾经事奉我事奉得不错。

text_variants.text: You stand steadier than most who pass this way. No matter — I know the promises you broke and the sins you once defended. Where do you think you are going, deserter?
text_variants.text_zh: 你站得比多数路过此地的人都稳。无妨——你毁过的诺言、你曾维护的罪，我都记得。你以为你要往哪儿去，逃兵？

start.text_zh: 你以为你要往哪儿去，逃兵？你生在我的城里，穿过我的衣色，事奉我比你如今肯承认的还要殷勤。你毁过的诺言、你曾经维护的罪，我都记得。

accuse.speaker: Apollyon
accuse.text: A Cross? You think a hill and borrowed words undo what you are? You will fail again. You always do. Come back before your new Master is ashamed of you.

choices.text: I may stumble, but I am not kept by my strength. You have no claim on a pardoned pilgrim.
choices.text_zh: 我或许会跌倒，但保守我的不是我的力量。你对一个已蒙赦免的朝圣者，毫无所有权。

choices.text: You speak my old name. I answer to the One who renamed me.
choices.text_zh: 你叫的是我的旧名。我只回应那位为我改名的主。

accuse.text_zh: 十字架？你以为一座山、几句借来的话，就能抹去你的本相？你还会再失败，你总是如此。趁你的新主还没为你蒙羞，回来吧。

rage.speaker: Apollyon
rage.text: Then stand there and be broken. If I cannot own you, I will drown you in fear and shame.

choices.text: Stand firm, pray, and answer with promise. (The fight begins.)
choices.text_zh: 站稳、祷告，以应许回应。（战斗开始。）

rage.text_zh: 那就站在那里，被打碎吧。我若不能拥有你，就用恐惧与羞耻把你淹没。
